channel.title: Comments for page "Sweet Dreams Are Made Of These"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Sweet Dreams Are Made Of These"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"…return from whence you came…"

This is improper English. "…return whence you came…" is how it should read. Whence means "from where."

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I would… but I actually don't speak english, so I always second-guess if it's just a language quirk I'm not aware of, or something like that…
So I rather ask! n.n

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It should. Thank you. Also, you are allowed to make minor SPaG changes to others' pages if you can be reasonably certain that the author just missed them.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
more adorkable then she would care to be seen as in public.

I think that 'then' should be a 'than'?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Good pacing, effective narrative, and Dark was well depicted. Her overall attitude fits my Mickey D's headcanon nicely.

Also, right finger through left palm is my default reality check for going lucid, so that was a very specific frisson.

item.title: Re: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
It was my pleasure to help! This is the first time anyone else has written about any of my stuff, and I'm so glad I was able to provide inspiration!

The only thing better than seeing people enjoy your stuff is seeing their own takes on it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
fallow fields, festering forests and forsaken fiends.

Mmhmm! That's some mighty fine alliteration you've got there. :D

Spoilery reactions!
Hide reactions

As I said in chat, the Nightmare King's adventure in the real world was an enjoyable re-imagining of the myth of Hercules and Alcyoneous. An invincible king within his kingdom, elsewhere he becomes… somewhat vincible.

Also I'm always glad to see someone subvert the "bullets do nothing!" trope.

The internet has pockets of wonderfully safe and supportive spaces where folks who have been through terrifying, real things can connect and help each other. Iris pitching this info to the Nightmare King as a source of potential victims echoes the horror of real life doxxers, stalkers and other ne'er-do-wells. Who for the most part use the exact same tactics without actually gaining anything from it except a fleeting power trip.

Unlike destructive human trolls, the King has a practical reason for doing what he does. And unlike Alcyoneous, he has the opportunity to learn from that experience. He won't overreach so easily next time!

Bravo all around!

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
So I loved SCP-4116, thought it was perfect for my canon, and had to write a tale about it. Ooga was the first beta reader and I'm glad they approved of this interpretation of their character.

Thanks to my Beta readers: IAmTheOoga, Stormbreath, Rounderhouse, Pratten, Mayoculpa, and Kakroom.

Special thanks to Stormbreath for starting the whole Night, Darke, The Investor and maybe others are brothers idea.
